name: Manifesto (Purple Grain)
description: Bold manifesto slide with a grainy purple gradient, oversized numeric hero, and a list of principles with arrow bullets. Ideal for values, principles, mission statements.

slots.name: points
slots.description: List of principles. First item is highlighted, rest are dimmed.

points.text: We listen closely, think deeply, and speak openly.
The more complex a challenge, the simpler a solution it demands.
Always put your biggest ideas on the table.
People connect with stories, not products.
